name: UNICEF
description: A light-blue field bearing the UNICEF emblem in the centre — a mother holding a child within an outline of the UN azimuthal world map encircled by olive branches — accompanied by the lettering 'UNICEF'.
history: The United Nations Children's Fund was established by the General Assembly on 11 December 1946. Its flag and emblem use the UN light blue.

features.role: UNICEF emblem (mother and child within world map and olive branches)
